title: Many young people say AI has become the new study companion
description: Many young people are increasingly relying on social media platforms and artificial intelligence (AI) tools for information and learning, with some saying these technologies have become more convenient than visiting libraries.

title: How AI can deepen agricultural extension in Nigeria, others
description: The International Food Policy Research Institute (IFPRI) and the African Forum for Agricultural Advisory Services (AFAAS) have launched a joint effort to explore how generative artificial intelligence (AI) can strengthen agricultural extension systems across Africa. title: 15 Thai AI companies betting on products, not hype
description: Southeast Asia’s AI scene is sprinting ahead, and Thailand is quietly becoming its laboratory. From generative spatial design and energy‐saving AIoT to sovereign Thai language models and an “AI nose” that tastes food, a new wave of startups is turning local problems into global products. title: Emerging market stocks hit record high as US-Iran peace hopes, AI rally lift sentiment
description: Emerging market stocks climbed to a record high as US-Iran peace deal progress cooled crude prices below $80 and AI-linked technology shares powered gains.
